title: Fiery Steamed Peruvian Chicken Tagine
description: A quick and flavorful Peruvian dish featuring chicken, peppercorns, and a blend of spices, cooked to perfection in a tagine pot using the mushimono steam method, this recipe is nut-free friendly and offers a bitter and shattering experience for the taste buds.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a tagine pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped aji amarillo peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chicken broth, lime juice, salt, cumin, and black peppercorns to the tagine pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the tagine pot.
Steam the mixture using the mushimono method for 20 minutes.
Remove the tagine pot from the heat and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
